requirement_topic.en: BIS Market Access — Household Refrigerators (IS 1476 / IS 7872)
requirement_topic.zh: BIS市场准入——家用电冰箱（IS 1476 / IS 7872）
requirement_topic.zht: BIS市場准入——家用電冰箱（IS 1476 / IS 7872）

summary.en: Household refrigerators imported into India must be screened against the BIS Act, relevant Quality Control Orders, and the applicable BIS conformity assessment route before commercial sale. For refrigerator product families, Indian Standards such as IS 1476 and IS 7872 are used as technical conformity benchmarks for performance, construction, terminology, rating, marking, or test-method alignment depending on the model type. The legal obligation comes from Indian law, orders, and BIS licence/registration conditions; the Indian Standards themselves are conformity benchmarks and do not automatically become interchangeable with Chinese CCC/GB test evidence.
summary.zh: 进口到印度的家用电冰箱在商业销售前，须依据BIS Act、相关质量控制令及适用的BIS合格评定路径进行筛查。对于电冰箱产品族，IS 1476、IS 7872等印度标准可按型号类型用于性能、结构、术语、额定值、标识或试验方法的技术合格推定基准。法律义务来自印度法律、命令及BIS许可证/注册条件；印度标准本身是合格推定基准，不能自动与中国CCC/GB检测证据互换。
summary.zht: 進口到印度的家用電冰箱在商業銷售前，須依據BIS Act、相關品質管制令及適用的BIS合格評定路徑進行篩查。對於電冰箱產品族，IS 1476、IS 7872等印度標準可按型號類型用於性能、結構、術語、額定值、標識或試驗方法的技術合格推定基準。法律義務來自印度法律、命令及BIS許可證/登記條件；印度標準本身是合格推定基準，不能自動與中國CCC/GB檢測證據互換。

standards_or_laws: Bureau of Indian Standards Act, 2016 — legal basis for BIS conformity assessment and standard mark controls
BIS Conformity Assessment Regulations, 2018 — certification, registration, and licence framework
IS 1476 — refrigerator-related Indian Standard used as a conformity benchmark where applicable
IS 7872 — refrigerator-related Indian Standard used as a conformity benchmark where applicable

summary.en: China's domestic pathway for household refrigerators normally relies on CCC for regulated safety/EMC aspects, China Energy Label for energy efficiency, and GB/GB-T standards such as GB 4706.13 and GB 12021.2 as technical bases. These approvals are domestic China compliance evidence. India does not treat CCC certificates or China Energy Label registrations as BIS approvals, and an Indian importer cannot clear or sell products solely on the basis of Chinese certificates.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的国内路径通常依赖CCC覆盖受监管的安全/电磁兼容项目、中国能效标识覆盖能效，并以GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2等GB/GB-T标准作为技术依据。这些批准属于中国国内合规证据。印度不将CCC证书或中国能效标识注册视为BIS批准，印度进口商不能仅凭中国证书完成清关或销售。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的國內路徑通常依賴CCC覆蓋受監管的安全/電磁相容項目、中國能效標識覆蓋能效，並以GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2等GB/GB-T標準作為技術依據。這些批准屬於中國國內合規證據。印度不將CCC證書或中國能效標識登記視為BIS批准，印度進口商不能僅憑中國證書完成清關或銷售。

standards_or_laws: China CCC framework — domestic certification route for regulated appliance safety and EMC
GB 4706.13 — Chinese refrigerator safety test basis used under CCC where applicable
GB 12021.2 — Chinese refrigerator energy-efficiency grade test basis

gap.en: The practical gap is legal identity and product-family mapping. The Indian importer/manufacturer must confirm whether each refrigerator type falls under an active BIS order, identify the correct conformity route, map model numbers and critical components to the BIS application, and submit India-acceptable test evidence. Existing China CCC files may be useful engineering inputs but do not replace BIS application data, Indian Standard mapping, local marking controls, or post-market surveillance obligations.
gap.zh: 实际差距在于法律身份和产品族映射。印度进口商/制造商须确认每种电冰箱是否落入有效BIS命令，识别正确合格评定路径，将型号和关键部件映射至BIS申请，并提交印度可接受的检测证据。现有中国CCC文件可作为工程输入，但不能替代BIS申请资料、印度标准映射、本地标识控制或上市后监管义务。
gap.zht: 實際差距在於法律身份和產品族映射。印度進口商/製造商須確認每種電冰箱是否落入有效BIS命令，識別正確合格評定路徑，將型號和關鍵部件映射至BIS申請，並提交印度可接受的檢測證據。現有中國CCC文件可作為工程輸入，但不能替代BIS申請資料、印度標準映射、本地標識控制或上市後監管義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where covered by Indian law, BIS orders, licence conditions, or registration conditions. IS 1476 and IS 7872 are used as conformity benchmarks / presumption tools where applicable; do not treat the standards themselves as the legal mandate.
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic certificates are not a substitute for India BIS market access. Chinese GB/GB-T standards are domestic technical bases and do not create India compliance.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat BIS market access as a separate India legal gate. Map the refrigerator family to the current BIS order and Indian Standard references, then prepare India-specific test and registration/licence evidence. CCC and China Energy Label evidence can support engineering review but cannot replace BIS approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】应将BIS市场准入视为独立的印度法律门槛。须将电冰箱产品族映射至现行BIS命令和印度标准引用，并准备印度专用检测及注册/许可证证据。CCC和中国能效标识证据可支持工程评审，但不能替代BIS批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】應將BIS市場准入視為獨立的印度法律門檻。須將電冰箱產品族映射至現行BIS命令和印度標準引用，並準備印度專用檢測及登記/許可證證據。CCC和中國能效標識證據可支持工程評審，但不能替代BIS批准。
